details: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), Ministry of Commerce & Industry has been implementing internship scheme for the students pursuing Under Graduate/Post Graduate degree or are Research Scholars enrolled in recognized University/Institution within India or abroad. The objective behind the internship scheme is to give exposure to the students to understand the working culture of Govt. of India and exposure to the schemes being run by this Department.
Students can choose a period of their choice ranging from one month /two months / three months as per their requirements. The applications will be accepted online mode only.
benefits: Interns would be paid a stipend of
per month. The processing of payment towards the stipend amount will be initiated after the completion of the internship period.
Maximum Number of Interns selected at a time will not be more than 20.
The period of Internship shall be minimum one month and maximum three months.
After completing internship, students will be awarded an Experience Certificate.
Those who will not satisfactorily complete the requisite period of internship will not be awarded any certificate or stipend.
eligibility: Applicants pursuing Graduation/Post Graduation/Research in following domain are eligible to apply:-
Candidates from other domains can also be considered based on requirements on case to case basis.
Interns shall be required to submit a brief report/paper at the end of their assignment to the concerned Divisional Head about their learning experience.

online: To apply for the Internship, the applicant may submit the application form:
Fill in the all the mandatory details in the form and agree with terms & conditions.
Verify your Mobile Number and Email ID.
All the applications received through online mode in the Department will be compiled at one place in the Establishment Division.
Sections/divisions will send their requirement of “Interns” to Establishment Division.

On receipt of a request from Division/Section for intern/s belonging to a particular discipline, the database of the available applications of that discipline will be provided to the concerned Division/section.

The concerned Division/section will transparently adopt a procedure and select the student(s) with the approval of the concerned Wing Head (AS/JS/DDG) based on their requirement and inform the same to Estt. G Section. Thereafter, Estt. G Section will obtain approval of Dir/DS (Estt) and send the offer of internship to selected Interns.
Online portal on DPIIT’s shall be henceforth open during the period from 1st March to 30th April and 1st September to 31st October of every year
for receiving applications from Students for internship.
Applications received during the period from
shall be considered for internship during the period from June-August of every year. The database of Students who have applied during March- April will be deleted from server in the end of August.

shall be considered for internship during the period from November to January of every year. The database of Students who have applied during September-October will be deleted from the server in the end of January.

documents_required: Bank Details (for the payment of stipend)

faqs.question: Under which Ministry is DPIIT?
faqs.answer: The Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT) is under the Ministry of Commerce & Industry of the Govt. of India.

faqs.question: Are Research Scholars also eligible to apply to this internship scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, the scheme is open to students pursuing Under Graduate/Post Graduate degrees or Research Scholars enrolled in recognized universities/Institutions within India or abroad.

faqs.question: Is there a deadline for submitting the application for the internship?
faqs.answer: Online portal on DPIIT’s shall be henceforth open during the period from 1st March to 30th April and 1st September to 31st October of every year for receiving applications from Students for internship.

faqs.question: How long will be internship be?
faqs.answer: Students can choose a period of their choice ranging from one month /two months / three months as per their requirements during the aforementioned slots.

faqs.question: Are the applications submitted online?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Applications are Accepted Online Only.

faqs.question: Are only the students from some specific educational domains are eligible to apply?
faqs.answer: Yes, applicants pursuing Graduation/Post Graduation/Research in following domain are eligible to apply:- i) Engineering (ii) Management (iii) Law (iv) Economics (v) Finance (vi) Computers (vii) Library Management

faqs.question: Is there an application link?
faqs.answer: Yes, the students are required to submit their application through the application form given at this link: https://dpiit.gov.in/internship/internship-scheme.php

faqs.question: Do I need to provide my Mobile Number and Email ID at the time of application?
faqs.answer: Yes, both Mobile Number and Email ID are required for the successful submission of the application.

faqs.question: Which documents are accepted as a Proof of Age / Date of Birth?
faqs.answer: The following documents are accepted as proof of age /date of birth: Marksheet Class 10th/12th, Birth Certificate.

faqs.question: Will the Intern be provided an Experience Certificate?
faqs.answer: Yes, after completing the internship, the intern will be awarded an Experience Certificate.
